name: Strawberry Nut Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the sweet strawberries and reserve 2 tablespoons of the juice and crushed berries for glaze.
2. Cream together the sugar, butter, and almond extract until creamy.
3. Beat in the egg.
4. Mix the flour with baking powder and baking soda.
5. Add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture alternately with the mashed strawberries, stirring gently after each addition.
6. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto lightly greased or Teflon-coated cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 12-14 minutes, or until edges are set.
9. Mix the reserved berries with about 3/4 cup confectioner's sugar to make a thin glaze. Drizzle over warm or cooled cookies.
This recipe yields approximately 40-45 pieces.
